allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Improve Why Choose DormSC section with CardSwap animation

- Added CardSwap component using GSAP for animated card transitions
- Replaced gradient colors with cohesive blue theme matching Aurora background
- Switched from Heroicons to Lucide React icon pack
- Implemented two-column layout with feature list and animated cards
- Cards swap every 2.5 seconds with elastic animation
- Added pause on hover functionality
- Enhanced visual consistency across the homepage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
